name: Widget Mode
helpText: Selects the loss type. Each mode sets its own accent color, icon, and default labels.

name: Override Title
helpText: Leave empty to use the mode's default title.

name: Override Subtitle
helpText: Leave empty to use the mode's default subtitle.

name: Severity: Medium Threshold
helpText: Value at or above this is 'MODERATE'. Defaults: 100 for energy modes, 50000 for financial modes.

name: Severity: High Threshold
helpText: Value at or above this is 'HIGH'. Defaults: 500 for energy modes, 200000 for financial modes.

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the dynamic tooltip. Leave empty for context-aware tooltip.
